actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (script guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) is Fire. BoxCollider present (IsTrigger=0), no Rigidbody, so use Trigger. Goal: cover automatic ignition path in Update(). Preconditions required: at least 2 neighbor Fire instances within maxNeighborDistance=4 are on; at least one neighbor positioned >= minNeighborDownDistance=3 units below to set hasDownNeighbor=true and apply downMultiplier=2. With Awake() overriding timeToOn to Random[timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60], effective ignition elapsed time is timeToOn/(downMultiplier)=20–30s when shouldTurnOn=true. Wait 35s to ensure isOn becomes true, shouldTurnOn resets, timers reset, UpdateFireState(true) called (pSystem.Play, NotifyAllNeighbors, FireController.Instance.FireChanged(+1)).

Cover water-suppression turn-off path. While fire is on, repeatedly hit with water such that Fire.WaterHit(Vector3) is invoked at intervals < maxHitInterval=2s until accumulated currentHitTime >= totalHitTime=5s. Expected: isTurningOff remains true, currentHitInterval never reaches 2s, currentHitTime reaches 5s, then Update() turns fire off, resets flags/timers, UpdateFireState(true) called (pSystem.Stop, NotifyAllNeighbors, FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1)). Suggested hit schedule: t=0s, 1.5s, 3.0s, 4.5s.

Cover recovery from partial suppression. While fire is on or turning off, do not apply any WaterHit for > maxHitInterval=2s. Expected: in Update(), currentHitInterval >= maxHitInterval causes isTurningOff=false and currentHitTime reset to 0 without toggling isOn.
